title: WhiteNetherite
description: A sleek retexture of netherite tools and armor to white.
body:
![5 Tools, and 4 Netherite Armor pieces shown in the inventory with the Resource Pack enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/615da844f9c6eaf60312e8e83fd9093dae671e22_0.webp)

This pack adds basic, vanilla-like retextures to netherite tools and armor. It reimagines netherite in a white form and gives an appealing look to the highest tier of ore in the game.

The pack format is selected to support a minimum of 1.21.9, but may work as low as ~1.21.3.
